regeneration_reason: templates.json updated — new theme_signature locks editorial / documentary aesthetic; previous draft used outdated 'Train. Laugh. Grow.' headline now banned by what_to_avoid.
fallback_reason: Available Canva MCP toolset has no design-duplicate path (import-design-from-url blocks canva.com URLs; no copy-design tool exposed). Fell back to fresh-generate per slot.fallback_if_master_fails. Surfacing so the master path can be implemented later.
canva_design_title: Instagram Post - THE WORK BETWEEN THE HIGHLIGHTS captures our community's spirit and joy.
